ab: azu a zuwa kuzulr misama’ za makavetra’an zi zuwa ’ami, na sēhu pakayki na mibunsiyo karuwa ta puvalray kananta ngadan na Yēncumin.
ch: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名的會議。
en: In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

ab: mukuwa ku kiumalra kanizu na i zekalr na vangsaran i Acung Ruvaniyaw na sawariyan lra kiami kana sēhu nata mibunsiyo ta pungadanay kananta ngadan na Yēncumin.
ch: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證「單列族名」的部落青年Acung Ruvaniyaw。
en: I interviewed Acung Ruvaniyaw, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

ab: inku za intaw kemuret mi kanini na katalaulepan awa ku kantaw kiumaumalra.
ch: 我和他約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
en: We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

ab: a kiyaumaumalr ku kantaw mu, tu pakazalramay ku zatu inuramiyan tu ngadan, zi tu pakanadamaw ku kanantu rinuma’enan zi maw nantu zekalr.
ch: 在訪問的過程中，他向我介紹了他的名字的由來，也帶我認識了他的家人、他的部落。
en: During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

ab: ku kiumalray intaw mazu nanu anger maranger venalis zata ngadan, izu na maluman na puvavalrayan mu kuwatreng ziya maw?
ch: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎?
en: I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn’t the old registration method sufficient?

ab: marengay intaw kaninku, nu ta tareminkukaw venavalray mu ’azi aruwa penauwa paredek kanatu pauwayan tu ngadan, na zuma na trau nu venavina kanintaw mu “izu na ma’inay” kema maw izu na muvasuk a sazu a kalikeliked a ngai.
ch: 他對我說，因為用中文字並不能準確的傳達他的名字，其他人還會叫他「那個男人」，也因此鬧出不少笑話。
en: He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him \"That guy,\" which resulted in many jokes being made.

ab: i Acung Ruvaniyaw marengay, “na vinavalrayan kana tu piningaiyan na Yēncumin na ngadan mu, maw na ninta kangadanan. naku ngadan aruwa pavuli kanata mawan, niniyam iniyamenan, niniyam ikatratrau mianger ta kananta mawan marekakazuwan tu aya’aw parevuliyas tu ngadan.”
ch: Acung Ruvaniyaw說：「原住民語書寫的名字才是我們真正的名字。我的名字代表了我們的族群、我們的家族、我們的身分，希望能有更多族人找回自己的名字。」
en: Acung Ruvaniyaw said, \"The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group, our family, our identity. I hope more fellow tribespeople can reclaim their own names.\"
